title: Create OnboardingDone component — DONE display with 5s auto-navigate and START OVER button
acceptance_criteria: On init: starts a 5-second timer then navigates to /reception/arrivals
Large 'DONE' text displayed: 10vh font size, bold, green colour, centred
START OVER button with play icon (pi pi-play), same oversized style as HOME button (8vh font, 16vh height)
START OVER click navigates immediately to /reception/arrivals
Timer is cleaned up via takeUntilDestroyed or OnDestroy to prevent memory leaks
signal() used for any local reactive state
Uses inject() pattern, no constructor injection
No standalone: true in decorator (Angular 21 default)
completion_summary: OnboardingDone created: 5s auto-navigate + ↺ START OVER button both call session.reset() + navigate to /reception/arrivals. Timer cleaned up in ngOnDestroy. OnPush, inject(), no standalone:true.
